race.comment: CLAUDEL (7) made a promising debut at Warwick Farm two weeks ago but ultimately gave the leader too much tether. Is sure to have come on from that and draws well again with Clark taking over. Interesting to see her dropping back in trip but she looks the one. GATWICK (8) has also gone under as favourite in her two runs back but switches back to the Sydney-way of running third-up which could spark her. FLYING ARTISAM (2) has been right there in his two runs back off a long break and now gets the blinkers on first time. Not dismissing. MISS SUPERNOVA (10) is knocking on the door and should be hitting her straps third-up. Inside draw helps.
